title: verbascum laciniatum
intro: Verbascum laciniatum, also known as cut-leaved mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the verbascum family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum laciniatum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting skin health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water or making a tincture, which can be used to make teas, salves, or ointments for topical application.
